claim: Code streaming in AI coding assistants allows users to see the LLM type out code in real-time for each file instead of generating the entire file behind the scenes and dumping it all at once
actionable: Use code streaming UI features to monitor LLM generation progress during code generation tasks
source_title: oTToDev is Becoming the BEST Open Source AI Coding Assistant

claim: Bolt terminals attached to workbenches display actual command execution output instead of just showing which commands the LLM selected, helping debug failures where the LLM hallucinated a bad command
actionable: Implement terminal output visibility in your agentic coding setup to distinguish between LLM hallucinations and actual execution failures
source_title: oTToDev is Becoming the BEST Open Source AI Coding Assistant

claim: The smaller LLMs like 3-billion parameter models cannot open web containers in Bolt.new without specific context handling modifications
actionable: When using smaller local LLMs with Bolt-like tools, increase the context window size and use model modifications to enable web container functionality
source_title: oTToDev is Becoming the BEST Open Source AI Coding Assistant

claim: Blank previews in AI coding tools are often not the tool's fault but rather result from the LLM hallucinating code or file structures that don't work correctly
actionable: When debugging blank previews, check LLM-generated file structure and code logic before assuming tool failure
source_title: oTToDev is Becoming the BEST Open Source AI Coding Assistant

claim: Respecting provider choice in UI ensures the selected provider matches what is actually used in the backend, preventing mismatches between user selection and API calls
actionable: Implement UI validation that ensures model/provider selection in UI correctly maps to backend API provider configuration
source_title: oTToDev is Becoming the BEST Open Source AI Coding Assistant

claim: An extension marketplace for coding agents prevents feature bloat and maintains clean UI while allowing developers to create and share plugins without forking the repository
actionable: Design plugin/extension architectures for coding tools that support optional toggleable features served from a centralized marketplace rather than built-in feature inflation
source_title: oTToDev is Becoming the BEST Open Source AI Coding Assistant
